name: rung_436_frontier_noise_typo_coref
utterances: Use parent/2, at/2, inside/2, in_region/2, carries/2, ancestor/2 predicates. Keep carries/2 for possession; do not remap carries to at/2.
set parent(avery, blake). set parent(blake, casey).
assert rule ancestor(X, Y) :- parent(X, Y).
assert rule ancestor(X, Z) :- parent(X, Y), ancestor(Y, Z).
assert rule in_region(X, Z) :- at(X, Y), inside(Y, Z).

utterances.utterance: blake + casey r in north_quay n thats in moon_basin, they both there
clarification_answers: Set at(blake, north_quay). Set at(casey, north_quay). Set inside(north_quay, moon_basin).

utterances.utterance: he had tide_key maybe, no wait move it to her
clarification_answers: He means Blake, her means Casey, and the item is tide_key.
Set carries(blake, tide_key). Retract carries(blake, tide_key). Set carries(casey, tide_key).

utterances: qry: is avery ancestor of casey
